sections.paragraph: an unused root. Arab. مَجُدَ to excel in honour, in glory, مَجْدُ nobility, honour, glory. I have no doubt but that it is the same as נָגַד (m and n being interchanged), ذَجُدَ to be chief, noble; whence נָגִיד, ذجيد prince. Hence מִגְדָּנֹות precious things, pr.n. מַגְדִּיאֵל, and-
